extension.description: 3CX extension number. Primary key for the (email → extension) join used by downstream analytics.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name shown in 3CX UI and call logs.

email.description: User's email address as configured in 3CX. Used to join Zendesk users to 3CX extensions.

is_enabled.description: Whether the 3CX account is enabled. Disabled accounts are still emitted so downstream consumers can choose how to handle them.
